title: Yard Broom Outdoor Heavy Duty, 10” Garden Broom Synthetic Hard Bristle Brush Head with Strong Handle, Stiff Sweeping Brush Outdoor
features: 10-Inch Synthetic Hard Bristle Broom – Clean your garden with ease! This 10-inch (27 cm) outdoor broom yard brush features hard-wearing synthetic stiff bristles brush head that is ideal for sweeping leaves and any stubborn dirt in your gardens, yards, decking, patios, and driveways.

Efficient Outdoor Brush Head Design – The head of this stiff broom outdoor is perfectly angled by 45 degrees which makes it easier to reach the corners and tight places in your garden. Moreover, the headstock is made up of high-quality plastic material with synthetic bristles making this outdoor broom heavy duty and suitable for both wet and dry conditions.

Multi-Section Stainless Steel Handle – This hard brush for garden comes with a 4-section sturdy handle that measures 120cm when assembled. The screw thread multi-section handle provides a secure and sturdy attachment to easily control the garden brush outdoor when cleaning. The yard broom’s handle will not rust for long-term durable use.

Heavy Duty Broom Ideal for All Outdoor Tasks – If you are looking for handy outdoor & patio brooms this is the right one for you! The yard brush heavy duty outdoor can sweep away large debris like grass and leaves, but can also clean small dirt such as wood chips, dust and sand. This outside broom is suitable for sweeping on different surfaces such as stone, concrete and wood floors in the garage, patios, gardens and yards.

Trusted Brand – The Dustpan and Brush Store supplies high-quality cleaning products in the UK. Trusted with proven good reviews from our customers, we continue to deliver worth-buying dustpans, brushes and brooms like this heavy duty 10” outdoor sweeping brush.
description: Product Description TDBS Outdoor Broom for Cleaning Decking, Patios, Driveways etc. The hard bristle brush is perfect for clearing dirt, leaves, and debris from patios, garden paths, and driveways. Explore a Wide Range of Outdoor Brooms from TDBS 10" Outdoor Broom Add To Basket 14" Outdoor Broom Buying Options 15" Outdoor Broom Buying Options 18" Stiff Bassine Broom Buying Options 12" Stiff Bassine Broom Buying Options 10" Stiff Bassine Broom Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 4,257 4.4 out of 5 stars 156 4.3 out of 5 stars 276 4.3 out of 5 stars 133 4.4 out of 5 stars 496 4.3 out of 5 stars 6,176 Price £9.98 £ 9 . 98 — — — — — Outdoor Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Bristle Material Synthetic Bristles Poly Bristles PVC Bristles Bassine Bassine Bassine Comes with Handle ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Surface Application Patio, Garden, Driveway, Deck Patio, Garden, Driveway, Deck Patio, Garden, Driveway, Deck Patio, Garden, Driveway, Deck Patio, Garden, Driveway, Deck Patio, Garden, Driveway, Deck Hard Wearing Bristle ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Durable Materials ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Highly Rated ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Previous page Patio Cleaner For Outdoor Cleaning This stiff broom provides excellent cleaning power for tough messes on patios, decking etc Synthetic Bristles Stiff Bristles The hard bristle brush is perfect for clearing dirt, leaves, and debris from patios &garden paths 120cm Long Handle No Need to Bend Detachable and durable, the handle of this broom outdoor extends to a comfortable 120 cm. Next page 1 For Outdoor Cleaning 2 Stiff Bristles 3 No Need to Bend Multi-purpose Outdoor Broom Whether used as a garden brush, yard broom, or stiff broom outdoor, it excels at tackling dirt and debris in all outdoor spaces. Versatile Outdoor Broom For Cleaning Patios, Driveway, Decking etc Keep your outdoor spaces pristine with the 10-inch Plastic Yard Broom. This heavy-duty yard brush features stiff synthetic bristles for tough cleaning, a 4-piece stainless steel handle extending to 120 cm, and an easy twist-and-tighten attachment for hassle-free assembly. Perfect as a garden broom outdoor, it’s ideal for cleaning patios, garden paths, driveways, and decking. What materials are used in the yard broom? The yard brush is crafted with stiff synthetic bristles and a rust-resistant 4-piece stainless steel handle, making it a hard bristle broom built for heavy-duty outdoor use. How do I assemble the garden broom? The garden broom outdoor features an easy twist-and-tighten system. Simply connect the handle pieces and attach them to the broom head for a secure, ready-to-use outdoor brush. Is this outdoor broom suitable for all surfaces? Yes, this stiff broom outdoor is perfect for patios, garden paths, driveways, and decking. The hard bristle brush is tough enough for debris yet safe for most outdoor surfaces. How do I store the outdoor sweeping brush when not in use? The yard broom comes with a hanging eye, making it easy to store this outside broom neatly in any shed or utility area. How long is the handle of this garden brush outdoor? The handle of this garden brush outdoor is 4-piece stainless steel and extends to a total length of 120 cm, providing comfortable reach and excellent stability for outdoor cleaning tasks.
